description_long: This is a large, modern sectional couch with an L-shaped configuration, featuring a combination of orange and black upholstery. The seating area and cushions are upholstered in a vibrant orange material, while the base, armrests, and some accent cushions are finished in black, creating a bold contrast. The couch includes multiple loose back cushions in both orange and black, arranged along the backrest for comfort and style. The armrests are straight and low-profile, matching the sleek, contemporary design. The legs are short, exposed, and black, providing sturdy support and a slight elevation from the ground. This piece is designed for spacious urban environments, offering ample seating and a visually striking presence.
description: A large, modern L-shaped sectional couch with orange and black upholstery, loose cushions, and exposed black legs. Its bold color contrast and ample seating make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, orange seat cushions, and a mix of orange and black loose back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seating and the arrangement of cushions along the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous black upholstered back and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sectional's length, cushion arrangement, and the low-profile armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose back cushions (three orange, two black) and three large orange seat cushions; all cushions are rectangular and not tufted, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with no visible patterns, quilting, or decorative stitching; smooth matte finish.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, straight black legs with a simple, modern design; legs are evenly spaced and slightly tapered.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, low-profile armrests upholstered in black; armrests are rectangular and integrated into the sectional's frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with loose, rectangular cushions; backrest is not tufted and maintains a modern, streamlined appearance.
